zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Anstye於1525年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可提本哈姆時，他的父親Walter Anstye27歲，母親Joane Flegg25歲。他於1550年與Mrs. Mary Anstye在英國諾福爾可提本哈姆結婚。他去世於1620年5月17日在英國諾福爾可享年95歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可提本哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter Anstye于1525年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可提本哈姆时，他的父亲Walter Anstye27岁，母亲Joane Flegg25岁。他于1550年与Mrs. Mary Anstye在英国諾福爾可提本哈姆结婚。他去世于1620年5月17日在英国諾福爾可享年95岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可提本哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Anstye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name for one who lived by a path, from any of the dozen places in England called Anstey or Ansty, from Old English ānstiga, a compound of ān ‘one’ + stīg ‘path’, denoting a narrow path. This surname is found principally in southern England and the West Country.

variants.name: Hancey
meanings: English (Suffolk): perhaps a local pronunciation of   Anstey  . This name is now more common in the US than in England.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Anstye was born in 1525, in Tibenham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Walter Anstye, was 27 and his mother, Joane Flegg, was 25. He married Mrs. Mary Anstye in 1550, in Tibenham, Norfolk, England. He died on 17 May 1620, in Norfolk, England, at the age of 95, and was buried in Tibenham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Anstye est né en 1525, à Tibenham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Walter Anstye, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Joane Flegg, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Mary Anstye en 1550, à Tibenham, Norfolk, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 17 mai 1620, à Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 95 ans, et a été enterré à Tibenham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Anstye 1525 in Tibenham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Anstye 27 und seine Mutter Joane Flegg 25. Er hat 1550 in Tibenham, Norfolk, England Mrs. Mary Anstye geheiratet. Er starb am 17. Mai 1620 im Alter von 95 Jahren in Norfolk, England und wurde in Tibenham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Anstye è nato il nel 1525 nel Tibenham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Walter Anstye, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Joane Flegg, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Mrs. Mary Anstye nel 1550, nel Tibenham, Norfolk, England. Morì il 17 maggio 1620, nel Norfolk, England, all'età di 95 anni, e fu sepolto a Tibenham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter Anstyeが1525年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクティベンハムで生まれた時，父Walter Anstyeは27歳，母Joane Fleggは25歳であった。1550年にイギリスノーフォルクティベンハムでMrs. Mary Anstyeと結婚した。彼は1620年5月17日にイギリスノーフォルクで95歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクティベンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Anstye(이)가 1525년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 티벤함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Anstye(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Joane Flegg(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1550년 영국 노르폴크 티벤함에서 Mrs. Mary Anstye(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1620년 5월 17일 영국 노르폴크에서 95세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 티벤함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Anstye nasceu em 1525, em Tibenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Walter Anstye, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Joane Flegg, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Mary Anstye em 1550, em Tibenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 17 de maio de 1620, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 95 anos, e foi sepultado em Tibenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Anstye родился в 1525 г. в местности тибенам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Walter Anstye было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Joane Flegg, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Mary Anstye в 1550 г. в местности тибенам, норфолк, Англия. Он умер 17 мая 1620 г. в местности норфолк, Англия в возрасте 95 лет и был похоронен в местности тибенам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter Anstye nació en 1525, en Tibenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Walter Anstye, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Joane Flegg, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Mrs. Mary Anstye en 1550, en Tibenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Murió el 17 de mayo de 1620, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 95 años, y fue sepultado en Tibenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
